kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Environment Variable
kw.msg: Environment variable 'PATH' set to value '/home/klaus/work/moducop-core-api-server/mocks/bin:/home/klaus/work/moducop-core-api-server/venv/bin:/home/klaus/.nix-profile/bin:/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin:/home/klaus/.vscode-server/data/User/globalStorage/github.copilot-chat/debugCommand:/home/klaus/.vscode-server/data/User/globalStorage/github.copilot-chat/copilotCli:/home/klaus/.vscode-server/bin/072586267e68ece9a47aa43f8c108e0dcbf44622/bin/remote-cli:/home/klaus/.nix-profile/bin:/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/usr/lib/wsl/lib:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/system32:/mnt/c/WINDOWS:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/Wbem:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/WindowsPowerShell/v1.0/:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/OpenSSH/:/mnt/c/Program Files/dotnet/:/mnt/c/Program Files/Git/cmd:/mnt/c/Program Files/WireGuard/:/mnt/c/Program Files/Tailscale/:/mnt/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/:/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10/Windows Performance Toolkit/:/mnt/c/Program Files/nodejs/:/Docker/host/bin:/mnt/c/Program Files/PuTTY/:/mnt/c/Users/KlausPopp/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps:/mnt/c/Users/KlausPopp/AppData/Local/Programs/Microsoft VS Code/bin:/mnt/c/work/flutter/flutter/bin:/mnt/c/Users/KlausPopp/AppData/Roaming/npm:/mnt/c/Program Files/heroku/bin:/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Nmap:/usr/local/go/bin:/home/klaus/.local/bin:/home/klaus/go/bin:/home/klaus/bin:/home/klaus/.vscode-server/extensions/ms-python.debugpy-2025.18.0/bundled/scripts/noConfigScripts:/usr/local/go/bin:/home/klaus/.local/bin:/home/klaus/go/bin:/home/klaus/bin:/home/klaus/.vscode-server/extensions/d-biehl.robotcode-2.2.0/bundled/scripts'.
kw.doc: Sets an environment variable to a specified value.

kw.name: Remove Directory
kw.doc: Removes the directory pointed to by the given ``path``.

kw.name: Set Environment Variable
kw.doc: Sets an environment variable to a specified value.

test.name: Application Error Inject After Stop Old Containers

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
